Home / Blog / Engage Pursuit Pro: Premium Pickleball Paddles

Engage Pursuit Pro: Premium Pickleball Paddles

By fitnest33 • 6/12/2024
equipment

Did you know that pickleball is a sport that mixes tennis, badminton, and ping pong? It’s become very popular quickly, with over 3.3 million players in the U.S. alone. That’s why pickleball fans are always looking for ways to improve. Engage Pursuit Pro offers top-notch pickleball paddles to help you get ahead in the game.

Engage Pursuit Pro has a variety of high-quality pickleball paddles. They use the best materials and new technologies to make sure you perform your best on the court. No matter if you’re just starting out or you’re a pro, Engage Pursuit Pro has the right paddle for you.

Key Takeaways:

  • Engage Pursuit Pro offers premium pickleball paddles designed to elevate your game and provide a competitive edge.
  • The paddles are crafted with high-quality materials and innovative technologies for optimal on-court performance.
  • Engage Pursuit Pro paddles offer enhanced power, control, and maneuverability, allowing players to take their skills to new heights.
  • With a wide range of models and designs, players can find the perfect paddle to suit their playing style and preferences.
  • Elevate your game with Engage Pursuit Pro and experience the pinnacle of play in the world of pickleball.

The Pursuit Pro Series

The Pursuit Pro Series is Engage Pursuit Pro’s top line of pickleball paddles. These paddles are made of raw T700 carbon fiber for top strength and durability. The line includes models like the Pursuit Pro1, Pursuit Pro MX, and Pursuit Pro EX.

The Pursuit Pro1 models belong to the 6.0 Power Series. They offer more power and an elongated shape. These paddles help players who like power and need extra reach to improve their game.

The Pursuit Pro MX and Pursuit Pro EX models have a classic shape. The MX model is for those who want power and control. The EX model is perfect for players looking for a balanced and all-rounder paddle.

The Pursuit Pro Series paddles use raw T700 carbon fiber. This ensures they deliver excellent power, responsiveness, and durability. The T700 carbon fiber strengthens the paddle, letting players hit powerful shots while keeping great control.

If you want an elongated design for better reach or a standard shape for balance, the Pursuit Pro Series has it. Upgrade your game with a paddle from the Pursuit Pro Series by Engage Pursuit Pro. Take your pickleball skills to a new height.

Pursuit Pro Series Models Shape Features
Pursuit Pro1 Elongated 6.0 Power Series
Pursuit Pro MX Standard Power and Control
Pursuit Pro EX Standard Versatility and Balance

Enhanced Friction Carbon Technology

The Engage Pursuit Pro now features Enhanced Friction Carbon technology. This is seen in the Pursuit MAXX MX and MAXX EX models. It boosts players’ grip and control.

This lets them put more spin on the ball and make exact shots in pickleball. The Pursuit MAXX MX paddle has a long shape. It gives players more reach and power.

The Pursuit MAXX EX, however, has a classic shape. It’s for those who like a more usual design and feel. The Enhanced Friction Carbon technology makes these paddles stand out.

They let players hit the ball with amazing control and precision. The special carbon fiber adds texture for better grip. This helps you keep the ball under control in quick games and tough matches.

With these paddles, you can improve your game noticeably. Whether you’re doing tricky drop shots or strong drives, this technology helps you play better than ever.

Paddle Model Shape Technology
Pursuit MAXX MX Elongated Enhanced Friction Carbon
Pursuit MAXX EX Standard Enhanced Friction Carbon

Graphite Paddles in the Pursuit Series

The Engage Pursuit Pro collection introduces high-performance graphite paddles in the Pursuit Series. They’re made to boost your pickleball skills. These paddles blend the toughness of graphite with top-notch design. This combination gives players improved touch, feel, and control.

The series includes the Pursuit MX 6.0 Graphite and the Pursuit EX 6.0 Graphite. Each suits different play styles. The Pursuit MX 6.0 Graphite has an extended shape for better reach and power. The Pursuit EX 6.0 Graphite, however, presents a standard shape. It balances control and ease of movement.

Graphite paddles are known for their sharp shot-making and great ball management. The graphite make enhances paddle touch and gives a lively feel. This helps players control the game’s speed and direction. Both the Pursuit MX 6.0 Graphite and Pursuit EX 6.0 Graphite can boost your game. They’re great for any player aiming to have an edge in pickleball.

The Benefits of Graphite Paddles

Graphite paddles bring many benefits to pickleball players:

  • Exceptional Touch: The graphite build offers soft ball contact. This lets players make precise, controlled shots.
  • Enhanced Control: These paddles ensure accurate shot placement.
  • Lightweight Design: Graphite’s lightness means less arm strain. Players can enjoy longer games without tiring.
  • Durable and Resilient: Graphite withstands tough play, making paddles last longer.

If you want to better your finesse shots, be stronger at the net, or control the game more fully, consider the Pursuit MX 6.0 Graphite and Pursuit EX 6.0 Graphite. They are top picks for outstanding performance.

Engage Pursuit Pro’s graphite paddles in the Pursuit Series mix finesse, power, and control seamlessly. The Pursuit MX 6.0 Graphite and Pursuit EX 6.0 Graphite paddles can push your pickleball play to new heights, ensuring you’re ready for any challenge.

Encore Series: Performance and Versatility

Step up your game with the Engage Pursuit Pro’s Encore Series. Known for its top-notch performance and flexibility, it lets players reach greater heights. Choose from the longer Encore MX or the traditional Encore EX paddles for improved play.

The Encore MX paddle gives you both power and precision. Its longer design means you can reach further and control the court. Play with confidence and style using the Encore MX.

The Encore EX paddle, on the other hand, feels familiar but super responsive. It’s great for those who like a classic design but still want top control and quick moves. With the Encore EX, your skills will shine in every match.

Both the Encore MX and Encore EX paddles are made from quality materials and the latest tech. They are tough, reliable, and designed to boost your game. Whether you’re a beginner or a pro, the Encore Series has something that will fit your style and help you have fun.

Features of the Encore Series:

  • Exceptional playability
  • Elongated shape (Encore MX) and standard shape (Encore EX)
  • Power, control, and maneuverability
  • High-quality materials and innovative technologies
  • Optimal performance and durability
  • Fits player preferences and playing styles

Paddle Shape Key Features
Encore MX Elongated Increased reach, power, and control
Encore EX Standard Maneuverability and responsive feel

Evolution Extreme v2: Raw Radial Carbon Fiber

The Evolution Extreme v2 paddle from Engage Pursuit Pro is changing the game. Its raw radial carbon fiber construction gives players top power and fast response. This makes their game better on the court.

This paddle stands out for its performance. The raw radial carbon fiber makes it strong and durable. So, players can hit powerful and precise shots easily. From hard smashes to soft drop shots, it improves every move.

It’s not just about hitting harder, though. The Evolution Extreme v2 also makes moving and reacting quicker. Thanks to its light weight and balance, players can zip across the court. They can hit back fast and accurately.

The paddle also has a great sweet spot. Its design means the ball often hits where control and power are best. This lets you play against any opponent with confidence. It can help win games on the court.

With the Evolution Extreme v2, your play will soar. It’s made for those who want to amaze with their skill. Be among the top players who know its value. Make the switch and see your game transform.

Key Features of the Evolution Extreme v2

  • Raw radial carbon fiber construction for maximum power and responsiveness
  • Optimized sweet spot for enhanced control and precision
  • Lightweight and well-balanced design for improved maneuverability
  • Designed for players who demand the utmost performance and precision on the court

Level up your pickleball with the Evolution Extreme v2. Dive into the raw power and sharp precision that set it apart. Let it transform your game today.

Trident: Widebody Design

The Trident pickleball paddle introduces an innovative widebody design. This makes it unique from ordinary paddles. Its large hitting area gives players a better chance on the court.

This paddle has a bigger sweet spot, thanks to its widebody build. This means players get more consistent shots, even with off-center hits. It helps players stay in control and hit accurately, even in intense games.

The Trident is made to meet players’ needs, giving great stability and control. The wider face boosts stability. This lets players hit powerful shots accurately. Whether playing a short dink or a big smash, the Trident’s design ensures top performance.

It not only improves stability but also increases power. The bigger hitting area lets players hit the ball harder. This power can change the game, making it hard for opponents to respond to the fast, powerful shots.

Pickleball fans favor the Trident paddle for its superior performance and trustworthiness. Its unique design and quality make it a reliable choice for serious players.

See how the Trident widebody pickleball paddle can change your game. Boost your play, control the court, and improve your pickleball abilities with the Trident paddle.

Customer Testimonials

“The Trident paddle has completely changed how I play. Its widebody design gives me the stability and control I need for precise shots. I highly recommend it to any dedicated pickleball player!” – Amanda Stevens

“The power boost from the Trident paddle is incredible. The wider surface lets me hit with more force, setting me apart from my opponents. It’s the best paddle I’ve ever used!” – Mark Thompson

Engage Sporting: A Premier Sporting Goods Manufacturer

Engage Sporting is a well-known US-based sporting goods maker. We’re focused on creating top-quality gear and clothing for active people everywhere. Our goal is to boost athletes’ performance and fun in sports like pickleball.

We realize how important sturdy, reliable gear is. Our skilled team works hard to make products that hit the highest marks for quality and function. Our range, from pickleball paddles to athletic wear, is made to help athletes shine.

We’re always inventing, using new materials, tech, and designs to lead the field. We work with athletes and fans to make sure our gear goes beyond what they hope for. No matter your level, Engage Sporting has the gear and clothes to lift your game.

Exceptional Products for Every Sports Enthusiast

Engage Sporting’s lineup serves athletes of all kinds. Here’s what we offer:

  • Pickleball paddles: Our paddles are built for accuracy and power, using cutting-edge materials and tech.
  • Apparel: Our clothes blend comfort, style, and function. This keeps you looking and feeling great.
  • Accessories: We also have bags, grips, balls, and more to boost your sporting life.

Choosing Engage Sporting means choosing rigorously tested, high-performing gear. We’re proud of our work and aim to help athletes reach their peak.

Why Choose Engage Sporting?

  • We use innovative designs and tech to improve performance.

  • We’re dedicated to excellence and pleasing our customers.

  • We create our products with input from athletes.
  • Our customer service is outstanding.

Engage Sporting stands for trust in sporting goods. Check out our products today. Start a path of excellence and success with our top-notch gear and clothing.

Free Shipping and Easy Ordering

Engage Pursuit Pro aims to make your shopping easy and smooth. We offer free shipping on orders over $75 across the 48 contiguous US states, except for oversized packages. You don’t have to worry about extra shipping costs for your pickleball paddles.

Ordering from us is hassle-free and saves you time. Just look through our high-quality pickleball paddles and accessories, pick what you like, and head to checkout. Our site is easy to use, letting you change your cart as you see fit.

We quickly process and ship your order once it’s placed. We know you’re eager to get your hands on your gear. Our goal is to get your items to you fast. This way, you can enjoy your Engage Pursuit Pro equipment on the court promptly.

Why Choose Engage Pursuit Pro for Your Pickleball Needs?

  • Premium Quality: Our paddles are made with great care, using materials that last and perform well.
  • Wide Range of Options: Whether you prefer the Pursuit Pro Series, Encore Series, or others, we have many paddles. They suit all playing styles and preferences.
  • Innovative Technologies: Our paddles come with new tech like Enhanced Friction Carbon, improving your game’s power and control.
  • Focus on Player Experience: We put our customers first. Our services, from free shipping to effortless ordering, are all about enhancing your pickleball journey.

Conclusion

Take your game to the next level with Engage Pursuit Pro paddles. These premium paddles give you a competitive edge. No matter if you play with power or focus on finesse and control. Engage Pursuit Pro has a wide selection of models and advanced technologies.

The Pursuit Pro and Encore Series, among other offerings, show Engage’s commitment to quality. They focus on craftsmanship and high-quality materials. This makes their paddles durable and functional for intense games.

With Engage Pursuit Pro’s premium paddles, reach the peak of pickleball play. These paddles help you dominate the court and win. Choose Engage Pursuit Pro for an unmatched pickleball experience.

FAQ

What makes Engage Pursuit Pro pickleball paddles premium?

Engage Pursuit Pro pickleball paddles use top-notch materials and cutting-edge tech. They boost your play and give you an edge on the court.

What is the Pursuit Pro Series?

The Pursuit Pro Series is Engage’s top line of pickleball paddles. They’re made with sturdy T700 carbon fiber for strength and durability.

What models are available in the Pursuit Pro Series?

The Pursuit Pro Series offers the Pursuit Pro1, MX, and EX models. The Pro1 belongs to the 6.0 Power Series for more power and an elongated shape. The MX and EX models have a standard design.

What is Enhanced Friction Carbon technology?

Enhanced Friction Carbon in the Pursuit MAXX MX and EX models boosts grip and control. It lets players add more spin and hit precision shots on the court.

What are the graphite paddles in the Pursuit Series?

Engage offers the Pursuit MX 6.0 Graphite and EX 6.0 Graphite paddles. The MX has an elongated shape, and the EX comes in a standard design.

What is the Encore Series known for?

Engage’s Encore Series stands out for its performance and flexibility during play.

What models are available in the Encore Series?

The Encore Series includes the MX and EX paddles. The MX is elongated, while the EX has a regular shape, suiting various play styles.

What is the Evolution Extreme v2 paddle made of?

The Evolution Extreme v2 uses radial carbon fiber for peak power and response. It’s for players seeking top performance and precision.

What is special about the Trident pickleball paddle?

The Trident paddle has a widebody for a bigger hit area and more forgiving sweet spot. It boosts power and stability for the player.

Who is Engage Sporting?

Engage Sporting is a leading sporting goods maker in the US. They offer a wide range of gear and apparel for active people worldwide.

Does Engage Pursuit Pro offer free shipping?

Yes, Engage Pursuit Pro provides free shipping for orders over in the contiguous US states, except for oversized items.

How can I order from Engage Pursuit Pro?

Engage Pursuit Pro makes ordering easy, so players can get the pickleball gear and accessories they want without trouble.
